content.query:
select 
gltran.CustomerVendor as CustomerID,
cm.CustomerName,
cm.CustomerClass,
sum(gltran.GLTran_debitAmt) as TotalDebit,
sum(gltran.GLTran_creditAmt) as TotalCredit,
sum(gltran.GLTran_creditAmt) -  sum(gltran.GLTran_debitAmt) as TotalOutstanding
from 
[ODS].[ERP_GL_TRANSACTIONS] gltran
left join [ODS].[ERP_CUSTOMER_MASTER] cm
on gltran.CustomerVendor = cm.CustomerID
where
gltran.[module] = 'AR'
group BY
gltran.CustomerVendor,
cm.CustomerName,
cm.CustomerClass
order by 
TotalOutstanding desc,
TotalCredit desc
